hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,os; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or data.get('tool_input',{}).get('notebook_path',''); proj=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR',''); sys.exit(2 if path and proj and not os.path.realpath(path).startswith(os.path.realpath(proj)) else 0)"
